title: Delicious Brazilian Frittata
description: A traditional Brazilian egg dish made with eggs, onion, bell pepper, and spices. Perfect for any meal of the day.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the onion and bell pepper mixture in the skillet.
If using cheese, sprinkle it on top of the eggs.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with chopped cilantro (if using).
Let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
